name: Antipasto
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop peppers, onion, celery, carrots, garlic, mushrooms, and cauliflower.
2. Cook the chopped vegetables in hot oil for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally until well-cooked.
3. Pour the mixture into sterilized jars, let cool completely, then refrigerate.
4. When serving, arrange antipasto on a pretty dish and surround with crackers.
